## Security Checklist
- [ ] No API keys or RPC URLs committed
- [ ] No `.env` files committed
- [ ] Wallet connect integration unchanged or explicitly audited
- [ ] Jupiter routing parameters verified
- [ ] No unreviewed external scripts or CDN links added
